name: KYUJUTSU: KESSEN OUGI - SOUGEKI (BOW ART: ABSOLUTE FIGHTING SKILL - SNIPING SHOT)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 4

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: F, Mas Mob

Make a single attack against the target. If the attack hits, it automatically becomes a critical hit. If the target is immune to critical hits, the attack instead deals one additional die of damage (based on the weapon's damage die). A Samurai with at least 10 class levels may substitute this technique for a normal attack when they make a Full Attack (using the same attack bonus as the substituted attack), but only if they chose the Kyujutsu path, and only once per round. If you substitute the technique this way, the Perform Requirements are automatically met.

This technique can be used once per day.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the bonus damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per 2 levels or 6d6 total.

Mastery: The second and fourth steps each allow you to use this technique an additional time per day.
